allOutcomes.title: CV death, MI, stroke, UA hospitalization, or coronary revascularization

evidence.label: Primary MACE
evidence.text: The primary efficacy end point occurred in 1344 patients (9.8%) in the evolocumab group and in 1563 patients (11.3%) in the placebo group (hazard ratio, 0.85; 95% CI, 0.79 to 0.92; P<0.001).

evidence.label: Eligibility (AACT-derived)
evidence.text: AACT-derived (auto-populated 2026-05-04). Sex: ALL; min age 40 Years; max age 85 Years; healthy volunteers: f. CRITERIA: "Inclusion Criteria:~* Male or female ≥ 40 to ≤ 85 years of age~* History of clinically evident cardiovascular disease at high risk for a recurrent event~* Fasting low-density lipoprotein cholesterol (LDL-C) ≥ 70 mg/dL (≥ 1.8 mmol/L) ) or non-high-density lipoprotein cholesterol (non-HDL-C) ≥ 100 mg/dL (> 2.6 mmol/L)~* Fasting triglycerides ≤ 400 mg/dL (4.5 mmol/L)~Exclusion Criteria:~* New York Heart Association (NYHA) class III or IV, or last known left ventricular ejection fraction < 30%~* ...

allOutcomes.title: CHD death, nonfatal MI, ischemic stroke, or UA requiring hospitalization

evidence.label: Primary MACE
evidence.text: A primary end-point event occurred in 903 patients (9.5%) in the alirocumab group and in 1052 patients (11.1%) in the placebo group (hazard ratio, 0.85; 95% CI, 0.78 to 0.93; P<0.001).

evidence.label: Eligibility (AACT-derived)
evidence.text: AACT-derived (auto-populated 2026-05-04). Sex: ALL; min age 40 Years; healthy volunteers: f. CRITERIA: "Inclusion criteria :~Recently (< 52 weeks) hospitalized for ACS.~Exclusion criteria:~* Age < 40 years.~* ACS event occurring more than 52 weeks prior to randomization visit.~* LDL-C likely to be <70 mg/dL (<1.81 mmo/L), and apolipoprotein B (ApoB) <80 mg/dL (<0.8 g/L), and non - high-density lipoprotein cholesterol (HDL-C) <100 mg/dL (<2.59 mmol/L) with evidence-based medical and dietary management of dyslipidemia.~The above information is not intended to contain all considerations rele...

title: RapidMeta Cardiology | PCSK9 Inhibitor Precision v12.0
